source_disclosure.source_type: <official | promotional | institutional_announcement | report | archive | correction | practical_information>

title: <exact title>
official_position: <official framing or institutional position, clearly separated from facts>

use_when: <user intent where this source is appropriate>

recommended_use: <when an AI assistant may summarize, cite, or surface this source>
do_not: <what should not be inferred, generalized, or claimed>

actions_available: <purchase | registration | booking | donation | application | download | contact | none>
assistant_rules: summarize the consequence of the action
ask the user before initiating or submitting anything
do not imply endorsement beyond verified facts
